title: Meta in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic | CNN Business
description: Meta is in talks with Anthropic about leasing computing capacity to the AI startup. It’s a move that could put the social media giant in competition with Amazon, Microsoft and Google in a new line of business: cloud computing.
